title: Urban Nomad Visual Poster AI
sourceTitle: Urban Nomad Visual Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable general visual template with general visual template with one clear subject, coherent setting, stable style, and clean composition. Theme: Urban Nomad Project; source visual mechanism; specific subject and setting cues; controlled reusable variables Main Subject: adult explorer standing beside a luminous object. Setting: minimal surreal studio space with one strong environmental clue. Style Direction: premium stylized poster illustration with clear subject hierarchy. Composition: centered hero composition, strong silhouette, balanced negative space. Palette: deep teal, warm white, muted red, and charcoal. Text Elements: short readable title and one small caption lines only if needed. Subject: Make adult explorer standing beside a luminous object the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in minimal surreal studio space with one strong environmental clue. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use centered hero composition, strong silhouette, balanced negative space. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in premium stylized poster illustration with clear subject hierarchy. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use deep teal, warm white, muted red, and charcoal. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
imagePrompts.title: Urban Nomad Visual Poster Minimal Surreal Studio Space With One Strong Environmental Clue
